result:
Results for 'top cultural attractions restaurants and things to do' in Udaipur, Rajasthan, India:
1. Jajmaan - Best Lakeview Restaurant & Hotel in Udaipur [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.7 (1700 reviews) | ₹400–1,200
   📍 55-D, Hotel Natural Marg
   "Have a meal the traditional way One of the best dining experiences"
2. Hathai Rooftop [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.9 (72 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 10 AM
   📍 Sajjan Vihar, Wild Life Sanctuary, 39, opp. Sajjangarh Road
   "Must visit they have live Rajasthani folk music which is just unbeatable."
3. Shaam-e-Viraasat The Haveli [Indian] ⭐ 4.7 (1500 reviews) | ₹400–1,200
   🕐 Closed · Opens 11 AM
   📍 Gopal Bhawan, 399-400, Marg, near Vinayak Hotel
   "A gem in a mystical city."
4. UP ~ The Sky Lounge [North Indian] ⭐ 4.5 (229 reviews) | ₹400–600
   🕐 Closed · Opens 11 AM
   📍 8th floor AmritShree 56, Ashok Nagar Main Rd
   Dine-in·Takeout·Delivery
5. The Forresta Udaipur [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.2 (680 reviews) | ₹2,000+
   🕐 Closed · Opens 12 PM
   📍 Main Rd, near Oriental Palace Resort
   "The food and music are a must to catch upon!"
